site.title: Intonation Labs — AI Consulting, GenAI & Production ML Engineering
site.desc: Intonation Labs delivers production-grade AI consulting — Generative AI, RAG systems, agentic AI architecture, and ML deployment for startups and enterprises. Based in Singapore, serving clients worldwide.
hero.desc: We design and build production-grade ML systems, GenAI solutions, and real-time inference pipelines for startups and enterprises worldwide.

cred.label: Credentials & Affiliations
svc.label: What We Do
svc.title: AI & ML consulting, from prototype to production.
svc.subtitle: We specialise in production ML deployment, Generative AI engineering, and real-time inference systems. Hands-on builders, not slide-deck strategists.
svc.1.title: Generative AI & RAG
svc.1.desc: End-to-end RAG pipelines, LLM integration, prompt engineering, and knowledge management systems for enterprise.
svc.2.title: Agentic AI Architecture
svc.2.desc: Multi-agent orchestration with LangChain and LangGraph. Tool integration, memory systems, and guardrail design.
svc.3.title: Production ML Deployment
svc.3.desc: Take ML models from notebook to production. End-to-end pipelines, monitoring, scaling, and infrastructure.
svc.4.title: Real-Time Inference
svc.4.desc: Low-latency ML inference, streaming pipelines, DSP, and real-time audio/signal processing systems.
svc.5.title: AI Strategy & Assessment
svc.5.desc: Technical feasibility assessments, GenAI readiness audits, build-vs-buy analysis, and implementation roadmaps.
svc.6.title: Monthly Retainer
svc.6.desc: Ongoing advisory, architecture guidance, code review, and fractional ML engineering for your team.
svc.7.title: Voice & Audio AI
svc.7.desc: Real-time audio processing, pitch detection, speech-to-text systems, and voice technology consulting.
proc.label: How We Work
proc.title: From first call to production deployment.
proc.subtitle: A structured engagement process designed for transparency, budget certainty, and real results.
proc.1.title: Discovery
proc.1.desc: A technical deep-dive into your challenge, infrastructure, data, and goals. We assess feasibility and identify the highest-impact approach.
proc.2.title: Proposal
proc.2.desc: A clear, scoped proposal with timeline, deliverables, technology choices, and fixed pricing. No ambiguity, no scope creep.
proc.3.title: Build
proc.3.desc: Hands-on engineering with weekly progress updates. We build production-grade systems from day one — no throwaway prototypes.
proc.4.title: Deploy & Support
proc.4.desc: Launch with confidence. We handle deployment, monitoring setup, documentation, and knowledge transfer to your team.
prod.label: Our Product
prod.title: IntonationAI — your AI music coach.
prod.subtitle: The first music coaching app that doesn't just tell you if you're off-pitch, but why and how to improve. Vocal, piano, and guitar coaching powered by real-time audio analysis and AI reasoning.
prod.f1.title: Vocal Coach
prod.f1.desc: AI-powered vocal technique analysis — pitch detection, vibrato analysis, breath support scoring, and register transition feedback, all in real time.
prod.f2.title: Piano Coach
prod.f2.desc: Intelligent feedback on notes, chords, timing, and expression. Get personalised coaching on technique, dynamics, and musical phrasing.
prod.f3.title: Guitar Coach
prod.f3.desc: Chord detection, strumming pattern feedback, and personalised exercises. AI analyses your playing and suggests targeted improvements.
prod.f4.title: AI-Powered Feedback
prod.f4.desc: Audio analysis in every response, RAG-enhanced pedagogy, dynamic AI exercises tailored to your skill level, and progress analytics.
prod.coming: Now live: Vocal, Piano & Guitar coaching with multi-instrument AI feedback
prod.stack: Built with Next.js 16, FastAPI, Gemini on Vertex AI, and Google Cloud Platform.
prod.partner: Interested in white-label or API partnership?
prod.pricing.title: Plans for every musician
prod.pricing.free.name: Free
prod.pricing.free.desc: Get started with vocal coaching basics.
prod.pricing.essential.name: Essential
prod.pricing.essential.desc: Unlock all instruments and full AI coaching.
prod.pricing.pro.name: Pro
prod.pricing.pro.desc: Everything in Essential, plus premium features.
port.label: Our Work
port.title: Built to ship, not just to demo.
port.subtitle: Production systems and peer-reviewed research. Every project is designed for real-world deployment.
port.1.title: Instant Harmonies
port.1.desc: Production-grade system for real-time music analysis and adaptive audio tuning, combining ensemble ML prediction with low-latency audio processing.
port.2.title: PhD Research — Real-Time Audio ML
port.2.desc: PhD research at Maynooth University on low-latency audio processing, predictive algorithms, and production ML deployment for web-based just intonation tuning.
port.3.title: IntonationAI
port.3.desc: AI music coaching platform with vocal, piano, and guitar coaches. Real-time audio analysis, AI-powered qualitative feedback, RAG-enhanced pedagogy, dynamic AI exercises, and progress analytics. Three tiers: Free, Essential ($19/mo), and Pro ($29/mo).
port.4.title: IntoMeeting
port.4.desc: Real-time AI meeting assistant for consultants. Live transcription via Chirp 2, instant question detection, RAG-powered answers from your knowledge base, Chrome Extension with side panel, multi-tenant org isolation, and post-meeting summaries with action items.
port.5.title: IntoMarketing
port.5.desc: AI marketing automation for 6 platforms. Daily content pipeline with Claude Sonnet and Gemini, market intelligence, lead detection with outreach drafts, newsletter generation, daily email digest, and analytics dashboard. Starter free tier, Pro at $29/month.
port.6.title: IntoBadminton
port.6.desc: Evidence-led badminton equipment finder and review platform. A five-step fit-scoring quiz with transparent recommendation reasoning, a source-verified product catalog, structured comparison guides, and a bilingual review archive.
home.products.label: Our Products
home.products.title: Four products, live in production.
home.products.subtitle: We don't just consult — we build and operate our own products. The same engineering discipline goes into every client engagement.
home.products.intonationai: AI music coaching for voice, piano and guitar, powered by real-time audio analysis.
home.products.intomeeting: Real-time AI meeting co-pilot with live transcription and RAG-powered answers.
home.products.intomarketing: AI content engine generating brand-aligned marketing across 6 platforms daily.
home.products.intobadminton: Evidence-led badminton equipment finder with transparent fit-score reasoning.
meet.label: Our Product
meet.title: IntoMeeting — your AI meeting co-pilot.
meet.subtitle: Stop scrambling for answers during client calls. IntoMeeting listens live, detects questions the moment they're asked, and surfaces the right answer from your knowledge base — before the silence gets awkward.
meet.f1.title: Live Transcription
meet.f1.desc: Streaming speech-to-text with interim results via Google Cloud Speech-to-Text Chirp 2. See every word as it's spoken.
meet.f2.title: Instant Question Detection
meet.f2.desc: AI-powered classification flags client questions the moment they're asked, so nothing slips past you.
meet.f3.title: RAG-Powered Answers
meet.f3.desc: Vector search over your knowledge base retrieves the most relevant context, then Gemini Flash generates a concise suggested answer — in seconds.
meet.f4.title: Knowledge Base & Export
meet.f4.desc: Upload PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, paste text, or scrape URLs. After the meeting, get AI summaries with action items and export to Markdown, text, or PDF.
meet.f5.title: Chrome Extension
meet.f5.desc: Side-panel Chrome Extension (MV3) for seamless Google Meet and Zoom integration. Access transcripts and AI suggestions without leaving your call.
meet.f6.title: Multi-Tenant & History
meet.f6.desc: Organisation-level data isolation with Firebase Auth. Full meeting history with transcripts, suggestions, and notes persisted across sessions.
meet.coming: Now live: Chrome Extension, multi-org support, meeting history & post-meeting summaries
meet.stack: Built with Next.js 15, FastAPI, Google Cloud Speech-to-Text Chirp 2, and Gemini 2.0 Flash.
meet.partner: Interested in enterprise licensing or API integration?
meet.pricing.title: Start free, scale when ready
meet.pricing.free.name: Free
meet.pricing.enterprise.name: Enterprise
meet.pricing.enterprise.desc: Multi-org deployment, SSO, dedicated support, and custom integrations.
mkt.label: Our Product
mkt.title: IntoMarketing — your AI marketing team, working while you sleep.
mkt.subtitle: Stop spending your week writing social posts. IntoMarketing generates brand-aligned content daily, surfaces market intelligence and leads, and lets you review everything from a single dashboard.
mkt.f1.title: Daily Content Pipeline
mkt.f1.desc: A scheduled pipeline runs every morning, generating brand-aligned drafts for LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Google Business, TikTok, and Xiaohongshu — text and images — automatically.
mkt.f2.title: Market Intelligence & Leads
mkt.f2.desc: Automated market signal detection, competitor monitoring, and lead qualification. Surface buying intent and turn signals into outreach drafts — delivered in your daily email digest.
mkt.f3.title: Brand-Aware Generation
mkt.f3.desc: Upload your brand guidelines, tone-of-voice docs, and product briefs. Claude Sonnet and Gemini on Vertex AI generate on-brand copy, while Imagen 3 creates matching visuals.
mkt.f4.title: Dashboard & Analytics
mkt.f4.desc: Review, approve, and schedule posts from a single dashboard with drag-and-drop calendar. Automated analytics sync tracks what resonates.
mkt.f5.title: Newsletter Generation
mkt.f5.desc: Pro feature: AI-generated newsletters compiled from your best-performing content, market insights, and custom editorial — ready to send.
mkt.f6.title: Daily Email Digest
mkt.f6.desc: Wake up to a summary of your scheduled draft packs, lead hints, and market intelligence — all in one email every morning.
mkt.coming: Now live: 6-platform content, market intelligence, lead detection, newsletters & daily digest
mkt.stack: Built with Next.js 15, FastAPI on Cloud Run, Claude Sonnet, Gemini on Vertex AI, and Imagen 3.
mkt.partner: Need white-label marketing automation for your agency or enterprise?
mkt.pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
mkt.pricing.starter.name: Starter
mkt.pricing.starter.desc: For solo founders and small teams getting started.
mkt.pricing.pro.name: Pro
mkt.pricing.pro.desc: For growing businesses that need more volume and brand depth.
ws.label: Learn
ws.title: Workshops & training.
ws.subtitle: Hands-on technical workshops and strategic sessions for engineering teams and business leaders.
ws.1.title: RAG Systems Masterclass
ws.1.desc: Build a production RAG pipeline from scratch. Covers embedding models, vector databases, chunking strategies, retrieval optimisation, and LLM integration.
ws.2.title: GenAI for Business Leaders
ws.2.desc: Understand GenAI capabilities, limitations, and ROI. Opportunity mapping, risk assessment, and build-vs-buy analysis for your organisation.
ws.3.title: Production ML Deployment
ws.3.desc: Take ML models from Jupyter notebook to production. Covers containerisation, CI/CD, monitoring, and scaling strategies.
ws.4.title: Corporate Training
ws.4.desc: Bespoke 1–3 day on-site or virtual training programmes tailored to your team's technology stack and business objectives.
about.label: About
about.title: Meet the founder.
about.name: Rui Su — Founder & Director
about.bio1: AI Engineer, AI Consultant, and PhD candidate at Maynooth University (Ireland) specialising in ensemble prediction, statistical modelling, and low-latency algorithm design. Bilingual in English and Mandarin Chinese, based between Singapore and Dublin.
about.bio2: Before founding Intonation Labs, Rui built Instant Harmonies — a production-deployed system for real-time music analysis — published 5 peer-reviewed papers on real-time audio ML, and earned 25+ professional certifications and specialisations across data science, AI engineering, cloud architecture, and generative AI from IBM, AWS, Google Cloud, and leading universities.
about.bio3: Intonation Labs sits at a rare intersection: deep academic research, production engineering experience, and hands-on GenAI expertise. We don't just advise — we build.
about.responsible.text: We are committed to responsible AI practices. We do not build systems designed for manipulation, mass surveillance, disinformation, or discrimination. Our work aligns with Singapore PDPA requirements and international AI governance standards.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.q1: What AI consulting services does Intonation Labs offer?
faq.a1: We offer production ML deployment, Generative AI and RAG system design, agentic AI architecture, real-time inference systems, voice & audio AI, LLM integration, and AI strategy consulting. We also deliver hands-on workshops and corporate training programmes.
faq.a2: IntonationAI is an AI-powered music coaching platform for voice, piano, and guitar. It combines real-time audio analysis with AI-powered qualitative feedback, telling you not just what went wrong, but why and how to improve. It includes a spaced-repetition curriculum, warmup exercises, and a song library.
faq.a3: Intonation Labs Pte. Ltd. is registered in Singapore, serving clients across Southeast Asia and globally. The founder is currently based between Dublin, Ireland and Singapore, with full relocation to Singapore planned for October 2026.
faq.a4: Our rates depend on the scope and complexity of the engagement. We primarily work on project-based pricing, which provides budget certainty for clients. We also offer monthly retainers for ongoing advisory and support. Contact us for a custom quote.
faq.q5: Do you work with companies outside Singapore?
faq.a5: Yes. While we are based in Singapore, we work with clients globally. We are bilingual in English and Mandarin Chinese, making us well-positioned for clients across Southeast Asia, Greater China, and English-speaking markets.
faq.q6: Can I attend your workshops remotely?
faq.a6: Yes. Our public workshops are available both virtually and in-person in Singapore. Corporate training can be delivered on-site at your office or virtually, depending on your preference.
faq.q7: What is a typical project timeline?
faq.a7: Timelines vary by engagement type. AI strategy assessments take 1–2 weeks. GenAI and RAG implementations typically run 4–10 weeks. Full production ML deployments range from 8–20 weeks. We provide detailed timelines in every proposal.
faq.a8: We work across industries including fintech, retail, logistics, e-commerce, healthcare, and education. Our specialisation is in AI/ML systems that require production reliability, real-time performance, or domain-specific knowledge.
